PostCompact.command:
echo '## Post-Compaction Context

IMPORTANT: Training runs on a REMOTE environment. This repo has NO live
access to training output. The user manually downloads reports and provides
them. Do NOT attempt to run training commands or read live metrics locally.

Read STUDY_DESIGN.md and TRAINING_METHODOLOGY.md for current experiment plan.
Before any model change: python utils/verify.py check
Verification workflow: .claude/rules/run-full-verification.md'
